text.message: First I time I see a gold player
It’s from the founders pack :). Bought it for like $100 USD or so about 5yrs ago
Supported colonist early on and got all maps and all expansions forever with no subscription
How are the others expansions ? Never tried them
Cities & knights combined with sea farers is one of my fav ways to play the game. Lot of fun!
Subscriptions are expensive though 💀 I wouldn’t get it if I didn’t have this sadly
now I see how it works
better dice for gold skin players
If you wanna see how wrong that is just look at
(And a lot of my wins are offline bot games)
That was some good luck though fr
Not gonna lie, the “watch this now” was perfect 😂
Didn’t even have a chance to use my flock
to test the water with the drty mono
That’s the one thing in this game that’ll make me salty
Respect for having the heart lmao
can we stop blocking me now everyone is on 7+
as opposed to you on 8 with 1 dev
or gold in exactly the same spot as me with open settlke
